settings.headline:
Soil first.
Then science.
settings.intro: Nutrient density and bioavailability start in the ground — not in a lab shortcut. Here is how we think about proof before product.

settings.label: Soil
settings.title: Primary on the ground
settings.body: We treat soil biology and plant diversity as upstream of everything that ends up in a daily ritual — not as marketing language.

settings.label: Bioavailability
settings.title: Absorption over hype
settings.body: What your system can use matters more than headline doses. The formulation stack is built around matrices the body recognises as food.

settings.label: Consistency
settings.title: Longevity is daily
settings.body: The science we follow points to habits and signalling over months — not one-off hero ingredients. That is why we are building for subscription from day one.
